---
title: "issues_testing"
format: html
---

hello make a bunch of issues please :)
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
covid19_county <- read.csv("data/raw/covid19hospitalbycounty.csv")
cacovid19 <- read.csv("data/raw/ca_covid_cases.csv")
```

```{r}
glimpse(covid19_county)
glimpse(cacovid19)
```


```{r}

orange_cases <- read_csv("/data/cleaned/orange_cases.csv")

```


```{r}
ggplot(
     orange_cases, 
     aes(x = date, y = cumulative_cases)) + 
     geom_line(color = "blue",linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
     labs(
           x = "Date",
           y = "Cumulative Cases",
           title = "Total COVID19 Cases Evolution in Orange County"
       ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
